text: Implement recursive compression of old session summaries in wrapped-agents to bound memory usage
description: The compressOldSessions function in session-memory.ts has a TODO: use LLM call to compress N summaries into one meta-summary when over threshold. Currently just logs. Implement this to keep session memory bounded for long-running autonomy. Integrate call from watchdog or periodically. This improves supervisor reliability and supports cross-session learning in the ASI ideation aim.
reflection: Completed via wiring aim 25c7b4e9 now done. The recursive compression now supports and uses LLM summarizer.

status.comment: LLM based compression implemented via the wiring aim. Now uses agent LLM for summaries.
